citation.description: test_f1fa_1144_false_absence_regression_fixture: the A1 false-absence blocking finding (plan named the actor, artifact, timing) is dropped via veto:absence-refuted when claims_absence=yes and absence_confirmed_in_context=no. The absence-veto is implemented in src/rebar/llm/review_kernel/decide.py lines 538-553.

criteria.criterion: Finding discovery drops (or does not emit) any candidate finding whose subject text is present and contradicted in the plan body; a regression fixture reproduces epic A1 (snapshot AC present) and asserts no such block is emitted.

citation.description: test_apply_contradiction_drops_the_contradicted_block_and_converges: reproduces A1 verdict (BLOCKING 'no one is tasked with capturing the snapshot' + ADVISORY 'parent explicitly assigns capture to S1'); asserts the false block is dropped, advisory survives, and verdict flips BLOCK->PASS. xcheck.py implements apply_contradiction_drops and maybe_apply_contradiction.

criteria.criterion: Validation assessment cross-checks findings within a single verdict for mutual contradiction and drops the weaker/contradicted one; a fixture reproduces the A1 blocking-vs-advisory contradiction and asserts at most one survives.

citation.description: test_apply_comment_trail_drops_resolved_finding and test_maybe_apply_comment_trail_runs_subcall_when_active: reproduces B3 (rebase:chain endpoint conceded in comment trail), asserts a0 is dropped with drop_reason='comment_trail'. xcheck.py implements apply_comment_trail_drops and maybe_apply_comment_trail.

criteria.criterion: Validation assessment consults the ticket's recorded comment trail and drops a finding that re-litigates a point the trail already resolved; a fixture reproduces B3 (rebase:chain conceded in-trail) and asserts it is dropped.

citation.description: test_enrich_operator_attested_clears_ac_unverifiable_upstream: a finding flagging an [operator-attested] AC as ac_unverifiable has its axis cleared by enrich_operator_attested, resulting in impact_plan(attrs) < 0.85 (not at blocking tier). Also supported by test_det_floor_operator_attested.py and src/rebar/llm/plan_review/workflow_ops.py:enrich_operator_attested.

criteria.criterion: Impact assessment distinguishes operator-attested criteria (ADR-0043) from codebase-verifiable ones and does NOT demand an in-session proving command for the former; a fixture reproduces B6 and asserts those findings are not scored at the blocking tier.

citation.description: test_discovery_fixture_reproduces_5e40_b2_b4: a contentless finding (B4) and a duplicate pair (B2) are submitted; after suppress_and_dedup only 1 finding survives with drop_reasons ['contentless','duplicate']. Implemented in src/rebar/llm/review_kernel/decide.py:suppress_and_dedup.

criteria.criterion: Finding discovery de-duplicates findings and suppresses contentless findings (empty body / no checklist_item); a fixture reproduces B2/B4.

citation.description: drift_floor.py implements the Pass-3 drift floor for plan-UNCHANGED+code-DRIFTED. _patch_candidate sets signed_sha='shaA', current_sha='shaB', plan material unchanged. test_candidate_eligible_when_plan_unchanged_and_code_drifted confirms eligibility. test_apply_drift_floor_flips_to_pass_when_only_novel_noise asserts novel-outside-drift blocks are dropped (block set shrinks to zero, PASS re-derived). test_maybe_apply_floors_when_eligible proves the wired path drops the novel-unrelated blocks. Together these constitute the sign-at-HEAD-A/advance-to-HEAD-B fixture.

criteria.criterion: Re-review stability (the headline criterion): re-running review-plan on an unchanged, previously-signed plan at a drifted HEAD yields a verdict with no NEW blocking findings relative to the signing review; a fixture (sign at HEAD-A, advance to HEAD-B with no ticket edit, re-review) asserts the block set does not grow.

citation.description: ADR 0052 (Status: Accepted, Date: 2026-07-19, Bug: 5e40) records: §1 'The remediation-cascade anti-pattern (a gate MUST NOT manufacture a block from an advisory)' and §2 'The re-review-stability contract' — both required by this criterion.

criteria.criterion: A short design note (or ADR) records the 'remediation cascade' anti-pattern (acting on an advisory must not manufacture a block) and the re-review-stability contract.
